untranslatable_reason: Pattern recognition requires visual/morphological detection of 'wide rounded Eve top' vs 'narrow inverted-V Adam top' which cannot be expressed using available OHLCV and technical indicators. The pattern identification logic (distinguishing two distinct tops by shape and spike characteristics) requires candlestick pattern matching or machine learning, not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted translation uses proxy conditions: rounded body with upper wick (for Eve top width), and range expansion (for Adam spike). However, this is a weak approximation of the actual EADT pattern. Exit condition uses reversal above SMA_20 as default per rules 8. Success rate in bear market: 72%, with 8% failure rate at 5% loss threshold. Pattern typically occurs after uptrend in both bull and bear markets.
